ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "typology" TEXT /* Typology of the property (e.g., 2 BHK, 3 BHK + Study Room) */,
  "carpet_area" REAL /* Carpet area of the property */,
  "saleable_area" REAL /* Saleable area of the property */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Market price of the property */,
  "our_pricing" TEXT /* Our pricing information, which may require a call for specific quotes */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "property_city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "property_state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "property_zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "parking_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the property was constructed */,
  "last_renovation_year" INTEGER /* Year of the last renovation */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., available, sold, under construction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing strategy */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of pricing (e.g., market price, our price) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount or range for the pricing */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date from which the pricing is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date until which the pricing is valid */,
  "discount" REAL /* Any discount applicable on the property */,
  "special_pricing_details" TEXT /* Details of any special pricing (e.g., limited-time offers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who made the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount for which the property was sold */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, check, online transfer) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent */,
  "taxes" REAL /* Taxes applicable on the sale */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was finalized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the customer */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer made an inquiry */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, company) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Annual income range of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the inquiry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_details" TEXT /* Details of the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the inquiry (e.g., website, referral, walk-in) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the agent */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team to which the agent belongs */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date the agent joined the company */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in real estate */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the agent */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales made by the agent */,
  "total_commission" REAL /* Total commission earned by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_sales" (
  "agent_sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between an agent and a sale */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate agent */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale transaction */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the specific sale */,
  "commission_amount" REAL /* Commission amount earned for the specific sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_sales_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)
